27549.title: Paul Hollywood: A Baker's Life
27549.description: Val and Selasi challenge Paul to bake a delicious pistachio and rose petal roulade. Paul shares his ultimate pizza recipe: a courgette, lemon and thyme bake from Venice.

27550.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
27550.description: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club which hides a toxic threat.

27551.title: Silent Witness
27551.description: The accidental fatal shooting of a Polish teenager in an armed police operation triggers a series of murders that link Turkish gangsters, a grieving family and a fractured firearms unit.

27552.title: Father Brown
27552.description: Tensions rise when members of a radical anarchist group keep turning up dead after arriving in Kembleford to perform a play in the park.

27553.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
27553.description: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club which hides a toxic threat.

27554.title: Impossible
27554.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

27555.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
27555.description: A local criminal, Billy `The Brick' Porters is the subject of the village's suspicion when the mayor of Arden is found murdered in his cottage in the dead of night. Lu and Frank try to exonerate criminal.

27556.title: Bargain Hunt
27556.description: Charlie Ross presents from the British Motor Museum in Gaydon, Warwickshire. Former Formula One world champion Damon Hill talks to Charlie about a very special car, whilst the reds and blues motor around the fair with the help of experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant.

27557.title: Bad Move
27557.description: Nicky and Steve decide to put a brave face on things and invite all their old friends from Leeds for a long-overdue housewarming party.

27558.title: Keeping Up Appearances
27558.description: Holding a riverside picnic seems like a good idea, but Hyacinth's arrangements don't go quite as she planned.

27559.title: Doctors
27559.description: It's the day of the charity car wash. Luca, Ruhma and Karen have to go the extra mile for their customers.

27560.title: EastEnders
27560.description: Jack has bad news for Stuart and Rainie. Bobby impresses Dana with Zack's help, Isaac's suspicion firmly takes hold, and Callum digs himself deeper as Ben makes a discovery.

27564.title: Mary Berry Cooks
27564.description: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

27565.description: Val and Selasi challenge Paul to bake a delicious pistachio and rose petal roulade. Paul shares his ultimate pizza recipe: a courgette, lemon and thyme bake from Venice.

27567.description: Holding a riverside picnic seems like a good idea, but Hyacinth's arrangements don't go quite as she planned.

27568.title: Bargain Hunt
27568.description: At the Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire, a father and daughter take on a mother and daughter to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, and they all have their sights set on a golden gavel. One team falls in love with a handmade dolls house while the other team sets sights on a pair of Edwardian glass eyes. Also, Anita travels to Sheffield, famous for its cutlery industry, to uncover the story of some pioneering women: the infamous Buffer Girls.

27569.title: Doctors

27571.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

27572.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
27572.description: Frank and Lu investigate death threats made against a former soap star who's about to stage her return to the limelight.

27573.title: Mary Berry Cooks
27573.description: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

27574.description: Val and Selasi challenge Paul to bake a delicious pistachio and rose petal roulade. Paul shares his ultimate pizza recipe: a courgette, lemon and thyme bake from Venice.

27575.title: Bad Move
27575.description: Nicky and Steve's move to their dream house in the country is rapidly turning into a nightmare because they cannot get connected to the internet.

27576.title: Keeping Up Appearances
27576.description: Richard is not exactly over the moon with his birthday present, but that is only the start of a series of problems.

27577.title: Doctors
27577.description: It's the day of the charity car wash. Luca, Ruhma and Karen have to go the extra mile for their customers.

27578.title: EastEnders
27578.description: Jack has bad news for Stuart and Rainie. Bobby impresses Dana with Zack's help, Isaac's suspicion firmly takes hold, and Callum digs himself deeper as Ben makes a discovery.

27579.title: Impossible
27579.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

27580.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
27580.description: The show reaches its climax as the three finalists enter the sewing room for the very last time. The sewing experts must decide who will take the title of Britain's best amateur sewer as they set three tough `couture' themed challenges.

27581.title: Casualty
27581.description: Fenisha's life is thrown into disarray when a familiar face from her past appears. Rash fights to prove his competence, and Marty goes the extra mile to support women's issues.

27582.title: Doctor Who
27582.description: Intelligence agents around the world are under attack from alien forces, so MI6 turn to the only people who can help: the Doctor and friends. As they travel the globe looking for answers, attacks come from all sides. Earth's security rests on the team's shoulders, but where will this planet-threatening conspiracy lead them?

27583.title: Bad Move
27583.description: Nicky and Steve are missing the city, and fantasise about all the exciting things they could be doing before both experience a bizarre and unusual day.

27584.title: Bad Move
27584.description: Nicky and Steve decide to put a brave face on things and invite all their old friends from Leeds for a long-overdue housewarming party.

27585.title: Ordinary Lies
27585.description: Fletch and wife Caz are the rock-solid office couple. However, when Caz oversteps the mark sending Fletch on a downward spiral, he wonders if she really is the right woman for him.

27586.title: Casualty
27586.description: Fenisha's life is thrown into disarray when a familiar face from her past appears. Rash fights to prove his competence, and Marty goes the extra mile to support women's issues.
